subject: Fw: Miles and Cathy
body:
ask brice if ok  i'm fine with it


----- Forwarded Message ----
From: "Miles Alexander, LSJ" <littlestjames@yahoo.com>
To: Jeffery E Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, May 7, 2007 2:46:45 PM
Subject: Miles and Cathy


Greetings
 
The pet movers have advised me that they may be able to arrange an earlier quarantine date. This will be confirmed tomorrow. The dates would be 15 May which means a departure date of 13 May. Per our last conversation, I wish to know if this is in order before I change tickets and confirm quarantine.
 
Please advise
 
Miles



Mr Miles Alexander

Phone : 340-5139855, Fax : 340-7758108, Email : littlestjames@yahoo.com
